# Provider Runtime / Adapter SSOT: Integration Gates

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerintegrationgatedocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to provider runtime](../provider-runtime.md)

Executable SSOT: [`integration-gates.riido.json`](integration-gates.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `provider-integration-gate-docs`.

This SSOT fixes the provider-runtime integration gate boundary as generated documentation, source anchors, and CI evidence.

The gates describe which public daemon packages own local runtime scope, SaaS adapter scope, task DB scope, local API scope, project sync scope, and real provider evidence.

## Executable Assertions

- Provider integration gates distinguish deterministic CI evidence from opt-in real provider CLI evidence.
- SaaS completed assignment evidence is not filesystem side-effect evidence without the daemon-selected workdir artifact.
- Runtime snapshot reporting is a device-level full set; missing providers remain explicit runtime rows.
- Public daemon adapters own local ports only; server HTTP/SSE, infra, Terraform, and deploy evidence stay outside this repo.
- TaskDB, MWSD, local API, SaaS plane, supervisor, and daemon lifecycle scopes are independent gate surfaces.
